name: Qualifying Fracture Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for qualifying fractures used in the Osteoporosis Management in Women who had a Fracture (OMW) measure. Includes fractures of cervical vertebra, thorax, lumbar spine/pelvis, shoulder/upper arm, forearm, femur, lower leg, and foot (excluding toes). Also includes pathological fractures due to osteoporosis. Excludes finger, toe, face, and skull fractures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
